SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
WITH THIS AS(
SELECT 
	 ds.HCCNumber
	,ds.HCCDescription
	,ds.HCCVersion
	,ds.HCCType
	,ds.IsChronic 
	,ey.EffectiveYear
	,ey.EffectiveDateStart
	,ey.EffectiveDateEnd
	,hash(concat(
			IfNull(ds.HCCNumber, "|"), 
		"|",IfNull(ds.HCCDescription, "|"), 
		"|",IfNull(ds.HCCVersion, "|"), 
		"|",IfNull(ds.HCCType, "|") , 
		"|",IfNull(ds.IsChronic, false) ,  
		"|",IfNull(ey.EffectiveYear, "|") , 
		"|",IfNull(ey.EffectiveDateStart, "|") , 
		"|",IfNull(ey.EffectiveDateEnd, "|")
		)
	) AS hashKey  
	,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY IfNull(ds.HCCNumber, "|"), IfNull(ds.HCCVersion, "|"), IfNull(ds.HCCType, "|"), IfNull(ey.EffectiveYear, "|") ORDER BY IfNull(ds.CreationDatetime, "9999-12-31") DESC) AS RowNumber
	FROM HCCDataSet ds
		LEFT JOIN  HCCEffectiveYear ey
			ON ds.HCCEffectiveYearID = ey.HCCEffectiveYearID
)
SELECT 
	 HCCNumber
	,HCCDescription
	,HCCVersion
	,HCCType
	,IsChronic 
	,EffectiveYear
	,EffectiveDateStart
	,EffectiveDateEnd
	,hashKey
FROM THIS
WHERE
RowNumber = 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript) s ON IfNull(s.HCCNumber,"|") = IfNull(t.HCCNumber,"|") AND IfNull(s.EffectiveYear,"|") = IfNull(t.EffectiveYear,"|") AND IfNull(s.HCCVersion,"|") = IfNull(t.HCCVersion,"|") AND IfNull(s.HCCType,"|") = IfNull(t.HCCType,"|") 
WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey 
THEN  
UPDATE SET 
	HCCNumber = s.HCCNumber,
	HCCDescription = s.HCCDescription,
	HCCVersion = s.HCCVersion,
	HCCType = s.HCCType,
	IsChronic = s.IsChronic,
	EffectiveYear = s.EffectiveYear,
	EffectiveDateStart = s.EffectiveDateStart,
	EffectiveDateEnd = s.EffectiveDateEnd,
	hashKey = s.hashKey 
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
   HCCNumber
  ,HCCDescription
  ,HCCVersion
  ,HCCType
  ,IsChronic 
  ,EffectiveYear
  ,EffectiveDateStart
  ,EffectiveDateEnd
  ,hashKey
)
VALUES (
	 s.HCCNumber
	,s.HCCDescription
	,s.HCCVersion
	,s.HCCType
	,s.IsChronic 
	,s.EffectiveYear
	,s.EffectiveDateStart
	,s.EffectiveDateEnd
	,s.hashKey
)
